headline: Caterpillar Taps PROPWR And Data Centers For New Power Growth
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) has entered a new framework agreement with ProPetro’s PROPWR unit to supply high efficiency power generation equipment. The agreement targets power solutions for data centers, oil and gas operations, and industrial customers. Caterpillar is also ramping up its presence in data center power infrastructure, aligning with rising demand for reliable digital capacity. Caterpillar is best known for heavy equipment, but its energy and power systems segment is a key part of...
